long_signal_definition: 1. Prefer stocks transitioning from Stage 1B to Stage 2A or already in constructive Stage 2 behavior.
stop_rule: Use failure below breakout/support zones or rejection at the long-term moving average as invalidation. Exact stop distance is unknown.
exit_rule: Avoid or exit names that fail on rallies into the 200-day moving average.
known_weaknesses: "Exact Stage 1B, 2A, 3, and 4 formulas. - Breadth thresholds for split tape"
